full_text:
Tumor tissue was cut and dissociated using Dispase. For 14.5 mL of DMEM/F12, I used 300 uL Dispase, and 150 uL DNAse. Incubated in the oven for 40 min; RBC lysis buffer 4 mL + 20 mL of medium. After centrifuge, I resuspended cells in 3 mL medium, diluted 1:10 and counted cells.

Dispase dissociated cells:

Cell count/ml 1):

total: 5.26 E6

live: 2.74 E6

viability: 52 %

size: 9 um

Cell count /ml 2):

total: 4.48 E6

live: 2.36 E6

viability: 52.8 %

size: 9.2 um

Total cell count: 146.1 E6

Total volume: 3 mL

Overall # of cells in 3 mL was 146.1 E6.

In order to freeze 100E6 cells, I removed 945 uL from 3mL tube with cells. Then, I added 5 mL of medium, centrifuged for 5 min. Removed SN, and added 5 mL of Stem Cell Banker. Added 1 mL of cells with Stem Cell Banker into each of 5 cryovials, and froze at -80 (16.04.2024). Each cryovial contains 20 E6 cells.
